200# return «

User rating: item not rated yet

Fighter type: Mage

Introduced in: Special offer

 

Write a review Send to Discord

Rate this item


description 2/6

Once in a while, creates a magic flash around the enemy warrior with the least current health, dealing 100000 magic damage. The Knowledge Keeper restores health equal to 50% of the damage dealt by the ability.

description 4/6

Once is a while, creates a magic flash around the enemy warrior and mage with the least current health, consistently dealing 175000 magic damage. The Knowledge Keeper restores health equal to 60% of the damage dealt by the ability. Every second, magic crystals fly out of all enemies with 50% or less current health and into 3 nearby enemies, dealing 250000 magic damage.

description 6/6

Once is a while, creates a magic flash around the enemy warrior, mage, and archer with the least current health, consistently dealing 350000 magic damage. The Knowledge Keeper restores health equal to 75% of the damage dealt by the ability. Every second, magic crystals fly out of all enemies with 50% or less current health and into 3 nearby enemies, dealing 400000 magic damage to targets and the enemy from which the crystals flew out. Once in a while, the Knowledge Keeper creates an energy dissonance zone in a small radius around a random enemy for 6 sec. The target of the ability and all enemies in a small radius around it take magic damage equal to 15% of their max health every second. While enemies stay in the energy dissonance zone, they restore 60% less health, can’t gain shields or damage-reducing effects, and can’t move but still can use abilities. On death, the Knowledge Keeper fires crystals at all enemies. Crystals deal 700000 magic damage. If a crystal kills an enemy, the Knowledge Keeper is resurrected with full health.


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

Once in a while, creates an enhanced magic flash around the enemy warrior with the least current health, dealing 150000 magic damage. The Knowledge Keeper restores health equal to 60% of the damage dealt by the ability.

description 4/6

Once in a while, creates an enhanced magic flash around the enemy warrior with the least current health, dealing 250000 magic damage. The Knowledge Keeper restores health equal to 75% of the damage dealt by the ability. Damage from magic crystals ignores shields and damage-reducing effects.

description 6/6

Once in a while, creates an enhanced magic flash around the enemy warrior with the least current health, dealing 500000 magic damage. The Knowledge Keeper restores health equal to 100% of the damage dealt by the ability. Damage from magic crystals ignores shields and damage-reducing effects. Damage zone by the energy dissonance zone ignores armor, shields, and damage-reducing effects.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

If an enemy dies within 5 seconds after taking damage from the magic flash, the Knowledge Keeper increases own health by 20% for 15 sec. Stacks up to 5 times.

description 4/6

If an enemy dies within 5 seconds after taking damage from the magic flash, the Knowledge Keeper increases own health by 20% for 15 sec. Stacks up to 5 times. The enemy from whom the magic crystals fly out is stunned for 0,5 sec.

description 6/6

If an enemy dies within 5 seconds after taking damage from the magic flash, the Knowledge Keeper increases own health by 20% for 15 sec. Stacks up to 5 times. The enemy from whom the magic crystals fly out is stunned for 0,5 sec. While enemies stay in the energy dissonance zone, they become electrified. Whenever an electrified unit uses an ability, the unit is stunned for 1 sec.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

On a hit, the magic flash reduces the target’s damage and spell power by 25% for 7 sec.

description 4/6

On a hit, the magic flash reduces the target’s damage and spell power by 25% for 7 sec. On a hit, magic crystals reduce the target’s max health by 25% for 5 sec.

description 6/6

On a hit, the magic flash reduces the target’s damage and spell power by 25% for 7 sec. On a hit, magic crystals reduce the target’s max health by 25% for 5 sec. Every second, draws the life force from enemies within the energy dissonance zone for 1,05 sec. While low on life force, enemies deal 30% less damage and take 30 more damage. Stacks up 3 times.

Materials

Crystal Shard
Mana Tap

purchase in:
Gem Bay chest
Parcel

purchase in:
Portal chest for dark souls
Conduit of Power

purchase in:
Dungeon chest
Magic Gaze

purchase in:
Arena battle
